name: Allegheny Answering Service
message: Allegheny Answering Service offers a diverse range of communication solutions including answering services and call center services, operating 24/7/365 from their location in the United States. They cater to a wide array of clients, from startups to Fortune 500 companies, ensuring that their services can be tailored to meet various business needs. The company emphasizes security and disaster recovery to provide reliable service during any circumstances. Additionally, they prioritize social responsibility by supporting community initiatives and causes important to their clients and employees.
